name: T4.1-real-capture-phase-2-1080p
description: Real-capture reproduction of T3.1 (Phase 2 stable baseline). Real SCStream on the main display (BenQ EW2780U, 3840x2160 native) + real AVCaptureSession on the Sony ZV-1 (1280x720). Composited HLS at 1080p with camera overlay, ProRes 4K raw screen, raw H.264 720p camera. Expected PASS — sanity check that real capture doesn't regress a known-stable configuration. If this fails, something is wrong with the real-capture plumbing rather than with any interesting failure mode.
